/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_action__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libmotor_action__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_action__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/motor_action/action/detail/rotate__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/prog1/ros2_training/build/motor_action:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libmotor_action__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.7 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
